HttpClient component ==================== The HttpClient component provides powerful methods to fetch HTTP resources synchronously or asynchronously. Resources --------- * [Documentation](https://symfony.com/doc/current/components/http_client.html) * [Contributing](https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/index.html) * [Report issues](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/issues) and [send Pull Requests](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/pulls) in the [main Symfony repository](https://github.com/symfony/symfony)
